description: Perform a Dynamic Traffic Assignment (DTA) study to find the User Equilibrium for the Bologna Acosta network (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/). Generate a baseline morning demand file for a 1-hour period (0 to 3600 seconds) with approximately 500 trips and save it to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/dta_study/demand.trips.xml. Conduct a 5-iteration assignment (steps 0 to 4) to produce stabilized alternative routes. Ensure all study files and the final iteration folder '004' are saved in /home/ga/SUMO_Output/dta_study/.
